notes: This branch tests whether championship tail correction should react to prior same-event underprediction instead of applying a fixed phase boost.
Residual boost is positive-only and phase-scoped, so it cannot use future scores and should not penalize events that are already overpredicted.
The defended residual-ridge default and the best prior phase-tail clue are included as controls.
